title: Jai Bhim
tmdbOverview: A pregnant woman from a primitive tribal community, searches desperately for her husband, who is missing from police custody. So as to find her husband and seek justice for them, as their voice, a High Court advocate rises in support. Will their battle for justice succeed?
synopsis: Released in 2021, Jai Bhim is a crime, drama and mystery film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.6 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 16 certification (FR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
